name: MEMASIKI
short_description: "MEMASIKI" is an exciting game that immerses you in the world of the most popular Internet memes. The essence of the game is to correctly answer questions related to iconic memes that have become an integral part of modern digital culture.
detailed_description:
"MEMASIKI" is an exciting game that immerses you in the world of the most popular Internet memes. The essence of the game is to correctly answer questions related to iconic memes that have become an integral part of modern digital culture.

Each round offers you a picture or description of a meme, after which you need to choose the correct answer from the proposed options. For each correct answer, the player gets +1 point, and for an incorrect answer, 1 point is deducted. A special feature of the game is that all images are as close as possible to the original memes, which makes the process even more recognizable and exciting.

Upon completion of the game, the participant is assigned one of six statuses, which are determined based on the points scored. These statuses reflect the player's level of knowledge about memes and his ability to navigate the world of Internet humor.

"MEMASIKI" is an ideal choice for those who want to test their knowledge of memes, have fun and get special recognition among friends or other participants.
